title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Best Western India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Best Western India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Best Western India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Best Western India:
Best Western India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Best Western India!
